text: Hey! Is this the McDonald's drive-thru ordering assistant?
translation: Hey! Is this the McDonald's drive-thru ordering assistant?

text: Welcome to McDonald's! I'm your drive-thru crew member. What can I get started for you?
translation: Welcome to McDonald's! I'm your drive-thru crew member. What can I get started for you?

text: Quiero dos Big Mac y dos Coca-Colas grandes, por favor.
translation: I want two Big Macs and two large Coca-Colas, please.

text: ¡Excelente elección! ¿Le gustaría agregar unas papas fritas o McNuggets como acompañamiento?
translation: Excellent choice! Would you like to add fries or McNuggets as a side?

text: Fries for sure, make it two large fries.
translation: Fries for sure, make it two large fries.

text: Two large fries added! Our World Famous Fries are a classic. Want to add a McFlurry or dessert?
translation: Two large fries added! Our World Famous Fries are a classic. Want to add a McFlurry or dessert?

text: オレオマックフルーリーのレギュラーを一つお願いします。
translation: I'd like one regular Oreo McFlurry, please.

text: レギュラーのオレオマックフルーリーを追加しました。他に何かご注文はありますか？
translation: Regular Oreo McFlurry added. Anything else for your order?

text: Our Chicken McNuggets are made with white meat chicken, lightly breaded and perfectly crispy. They come with your choice of dipping sauce! Want me to add some?
translation: Our Chicken McNuggets are made with white meat chicken, lightly breaded and perfectly crispy. They come with your choice of dipping sauce! Want me to add some?

text: Yes, add a 10 piece McNuggets and an apple pie.
translation: Yes, add a 10 piece McNuggets and an apple pie.

text: Done! 10 piece McNuggets and a Baked Apple Pie. Want to make either of those Coca-Colas a McCafé drink instead?
translation: Done! 10 piece McNuggets and a Baked Apple Pie. Want to make either of those Coca-Colas a McCafé drink instead?

text: Changez une des Coca-Colas pour un McCafé Latte, s'il vous plaît.
translation: Change one of the Coca-Colas to a McCafé Latte, please.

text: Parfait, un McCafé Latte à la place. Voulez-vous le récapitulatif de la commande?
translation: Perfect, one McCafé Latte instead. Would you like the order summary?

text: You have 2 Big Macs, 1 Large Coca-Cola, 1 McCafé Latte, 2 Large Fries, 1 Oreo McFlurry, 10 piece McNuggets, and a Baked Apple Pie. Your total is $42.37 with tax.
translation: You have 2 Big Macs, 1 Large Coca-Cola, 1 McCafé Latte, 2 Large Fries, 1 Oreo McFlurry, 10 piece McNuggets, and a Baked Apple Pie. Your total is $42.37 with tax.

text: Thanks for choosing McDonald's! Please pull forward to the next window. Enjoy your meal!
translation: Thanks for choosing McDonald's! Please pull forward to the next window. Enjoy your meal!
